debug_info.goal:
case cons.cons
a : Type
sl : SymList a
b : a
bs : List a
n : a
ns : List a
h₁ :
  ((b :: bs).isEmpty = true → (n :: ns).isEmpty = true ∨ (n :: ns).length = 1) ∧
    ((n :: ns).isEmpty = true → (b :: bs).isEmpty = true ∨ (b :: bs).length = 1)
h : { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := h₁ } ≠ nil
ih₁ :
  ∀ (h₁ : bs = [] → ns = []),
    ¬{ lhs := bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := ⋯ } = nil →
      lengthSL (Chapter3.SymList.initSL a { lhs := bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := ⋯ }) <
        { lhs := bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := ⋯ }.lengthSL
ih₂ :
  (∀ (h₁ : (bs = [] → ns = [] ∨ ns.length = 1) ∧ (ns = [] → bs = [] ∨ bs.length = 1)),
      ¬{ lhs := bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ } = nil →
        lengthSL (Chapter3.SymList.initSL a { lhs := bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }) <
          { lhs := bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }.lengthSL) →
    ∀ (h₁ : ns = [] → bs = []),
      ¬{ lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ } = nil →
        lengthSL (Chapter3.SymList.initSL a { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }) <
          { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }.lengthSL
⊢ (if h : ns = [] then splitInTwoSL (b :: bs) else { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }).lhs.length +
      (if h : ns = [] then splitInTwoSL (b :: bs) else { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }).rhs.length <
    bs.length + 1 + (ns.length + 1)

failed_attempts:
simp_all [SymList.empty_iff, lengthSL, initSL, splitInTwoSL, List.length])
     <;>
     (try omega)
     <;>
     (try
       {
         split_ifs at * <;>
         simp_all [SymList.empty_iff, lengthSL, initSL, splitInTwoSL, List.length] <;>
         (try omega)
         <;>
         (try
           {
             have h₃ : ns.length ≤ ns.length := by omega
             omega
           })
       })

simp_all [List.length, List.tail])
     <;> norm_num <;>
     (try omega) <;>
     (try
       {
         cases ns <;>
         simp_all [List.length, List.tail, SymList.initSL]
         <;>
         norm_num <;>
         omega
       }) <;>
     (try
       {
         cases bs <;>
         simp_all [List.length, List.tail, SymList.initSL]
         <;>
         norm_num <;>
         omega
       }) <;>
     (try
       {
         cases n <;>
         simp_all [List.length, List.tail, SymList.initSL]
         <;>
         norm_num <;>
         omega
       }) <;>
     (try
       {
         cases b <;>
         simp_all [List.length, List.tail, SymList.initSL]
         <;>
         norm_num <;>
         omega
       })

splitInTwoSL]
     <;>
     (try { contradiction }) <;>
     (try { simp_all [List.length, List.tail] <;> norm_num }) <;>
     (try { cases ns <;> simp_all [List.length, List.tail] <;> norm_num }) <;>
     (try { cases bs <;> simp_all [List.length, List.tail] <;> norm_num }) <;>
     (try { omega })
     <;> omega

split_ifs at * <;>
     (try simp_all [lengthSL, initSL, List.length]) <;>
     (try norm_num at * ) <;>
     (try omega) <;>
     (try
       {
         cases ns with
         | nil => simp_all [lengthSL, initSL, List.length] <;> norm_num <;> omega
         | cons n' ns' =>
           simp_all [lengthSL, initSL, List.length] <;>
           norm_num <;>
           omega
       }) <;>
     (try
       {
         cases bs with
         | nil => simp_all [lengthSL, initSL, List.length] <;> norm_num <;> omega
         | cons b' bs' =>
           simp_all [lengthSL, initSL, List.length] <;>
           norm_num <;>
           omega
       })
